hero.name: Thiago Pacheco
hero.bio: At 21, I am a Software Engineering graduate from the University of Buenos Aires, holding the distinction of being one of only three individuals in the institution's history to complete the degree in record time—a milestone untouched since 1938. As a Junior Data Engineer at Lovelytics, I channel my passion into architecting robust software solutions, thriving at the intersection of complex distributed systems and cutting-edge AI technologies.

items.shortDesc: Architecting scalable data pipelines and driving enterprise-level engineering solutions at a premier US-based analytics firm.
items.fullDesc: As a Junior Data Engineer at Lovelytics, a prominent US-based analytics corporation, I specialize in designing and deploying highly scalable data pipelines. I focus on optimizing complex data workflows and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver sophisticated, data-driven solutions that empower enterprise clients.

items.shortDesc: Champion of the faculty's premier engineering hackathon, delivering a winning tech solution validated by industry executives and government officials.
items.fullDesc: First-place winner at FIUBAtón 2025, the flagship engineering competition hosted by the Faculty of Engineering (FIUBA). Leading a collaborative team, we engineered an innovative solution to a high-stakes, real-world challenge. Our project secured the winning vote from a distinguished panel of corporate executives, investors, and high-ranking national authorities.

items.title: Melodía
items.shortDesc: A highly advanced, full-stack music streaming platform engineered with a seamless UI and groundbreaking AI capabilities.
items.fullDesc: An ambitious, full-stack recreation of Spotify that matches its core streaming infrastructure while introducing two disruptive features. It boasts an advanced audio-recognition engine (Shazam-style) capable of identifying tracks via humming or ambient playback. Furthermore, it integrates a real-time 'AI Cover' engine, allowing users to seamlessly map any artist's vocal model onto any track—effortlessly engineering crossovers like Michael Jackson performing a Queen anthem.

items.title: VibeTrip
items.shortDesc: A comprehensive, full-stack travel discovery ecosystem modeled after TripAdvisor.
items.fullDesc: A robust, full-stack platform inspired by TripAdvisor, engineered to facilitate global travel discovery. It features a seamless UI/UX for destination exploration, dynamic user-generated reviews, and interactive trip-planning tools, all backed by a highly optimized database architecture.

items.title: Cassandra Engine
items.shortDesc: A high-performance, distributed Cassandra database engine engineered entirely from scratch in Rust.
items.fullDesc: A zero-dependency, ground-up implementation of an Apache Cassandra distributed database engine written entirely in Rust. This system strictly adheres to native Cassandra protocols—including the CQL binary protocol and Gossip protocol for peer-to-peer node discovery—ensuring fault tolerance, high availability, and rigorous data consistency across distributed clusters.

items.title: SpecForge
items.shortDesc: An AI-driven CLI platform for automated Property-Based Testing (PBT) and API vulnerability detection.
items.fullDesc: My degree thesis: a sophisticated CLI platform designed for language-agnostic Property-Based Testing (PBT) of APIs. It integrates large language models (LLMs) with advanced Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) parsing and deep code logic extraction. By leveraging a proprietary schema synthesis engine, SpecForge autonomously generates comprehensive test suites to expose edge cases, unearth security vulnerabilities, and stress-test volume limits across any API endpoint.

items.description: Became the third person in the institution's entire history to earn a Software Engineering degree in record time—an unprecedented achievement untouched since 1938.
Secured 2nd place nationwide at the Argentine Informatics Olympiad, demonstrating elite algorithmic problem-solving skills at just 16 years old.

items.institution: Escuela Superior de Comercio Carlos Pellegrini
items.description: Alumnus of the Escuela Superior de Comercio Carlos Pellegrini, widely recognized as one of Argentina's most rigorous and prestigious academic institutions.
